_note: This file is a design-time snapshot and may be out of date. For current step state, run: iw item-status <ID> --json. The DB is the authoritative source of truth (CR-00023).
title: Coverage gates — raise the floor, ratchet it, and gate diff-coverage on PRs (P1-CR-B)

steps.description: Measure current line+branch coverage (`make test`); raise [tool.coverage.report] fail_under to just below the measured branch % (with headroom); add [tool.coverage.run] relative_files = true; add `diff-cover` dev dep (regenerates uv.lock); add a self-contained `make diff-coverage` target (own combined unit+integration coverage → diff-cover --compare-branch=origin/main --fail-under=N≈90); add the `diff-coverage` gate to skills/iw-workflow/SKILL.md canon after `integration-tests` (+ update the 'N canonical gates' prose); add a pull_request-conditional `Run diff coverage` step to .github/workflows/test-quality.yml's unit job; confirm the rest of the 1.10 coverage-plumbing audit and record findings; update docs/IW_AI_Core_Testing_Strategy.md §1/§5/§9 + a diff-coverage paragraph; update skills/iw-ai-core-testing/SKILL.md §8; run `iw sync-skills`; tick items 1.2/1.3/1.10-audit + §5 grouping + changelog in ai-dev/work/TESTS_ENHANCEMENT.md; optional RED-first guard test tests/unit/test_coverage_gate_config.py; record tdd_red_evidence (guard-test RED run, or the 'n/a — config/Makefile/skill/workflow + dependency add' form). `make quality` + `make check` must still pass.

Review S01: fail_under value sensible (below the recorded measurement, with headroom); `make diff-coverage` correct (combined coverage source, --compare-branch=origin/main, --fail-under, exits non-zero on shortfall, self-contained); `diff-coverage` QV gate placement + prose update; the GH step's pull_request conditional + fetch-depth handling; relative_files added; uv.lock updated; docs/plan/skill updates; `iw sync-skills` ran (diff .claude/skills/* vs masters); cov-plumbing audit findings recorded; no out-of-scope edits.

Global review: coverage-config <-> Makefile <-> skill canon <-> GH workflow <-> docs chain consistent; `diff-coverage` wired into both CI surfaces with the right coverage source for each (daemon=combined, GH=unit); .claude/skills/ copies in sync; cov-plumbing audit recorded; `make quality`/`make check` pass; no scope creep into the integration-gate fix / other Phase-1 deps / baseline scrub.
QV: Assertion scanner (forbid new vacuous tests)
QV: Diff coverage (the new gate, dogfooded on its own CR)
Self-assessment of the just-completed item via the iw-item-analyze skill
